messages.content: Implement async queue with bounded capacity and backpressure

tool_use.name: BashTool
tool_use.input: node -e "class AsyncQueue{constructor(cap){this.cap=cap;this.q=[];}async enqueue(item){while(this.q.length>=this.cap)await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,10));this.q.push(item);}async dequeue(){while(!this.q.length)await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,10));return this.q.shift();}}console.log('AsyncQueue ready')"
